errors.message: The plural subject 'focus' requires a plural verb form 'are' to be changed to 'is' because the predicate is singular.
errors.context: My primary focus are automation testing

errors.message: 'Codes' is an uncountable noun when referring to computer programming instructions.
errors.context: write uh testable, maintainable and reusable codes.

errors.message: Use the preposition 'to' instead of 'with' after 'contribute' in this context.
The noun 'percentage' is incorrectly used here; 'percent' is the correct term for specific values.
The phrase 'as soon as' is meant, not 'has soon as'.
errors.context: join immediately has soon as possible

features.raw_text: Hi, my name is Ella Porsit. I have completed my engineering from Vigyan Institute of Information Technology, Visakhapatnam with CGPA of 8.28. I worked extensively with Java, Selenium, TestNG, CI CD pipelines and SQL and API testing. I built automation frameworks and integrated with CI CD pipelines to understand the object oriented programming and that uh clean code and system behavior. My QA background helped me to think logically and write uh testable, maintainable and reusable codes. Yeah, in my B Tech, I got around 78 percentage and in 10th class I got 90 percentage and in inter 12th I got 94 percentage. Yeah, in my previous role, I worked in manual testing as well as SQL for database validation and data inconsistency. Yeah, I'm flexible to any working hours as per the project requirements. Yeah, my current CTC was 4.12 uh with 3 lakhs fixed and 1.12000 uh variable pay and my expected CTC was I can uh I'm flexible to any CTC which which uh according to the uh business market standards and my skills and I'm open to uh discussion.
